docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARRY SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANCE BUDDE DBA IBCS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-21-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LANCE BUDDE DBA IBCS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GARRY SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRY SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANCE BUDDE DBA IBCS $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,658.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LANCE BUDDE DBA IBCS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GARRY SUSAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
